message:
Hi {{ doc.employee_name or doc.employee }},

HR has prepared an Equipment Loan Agreement for you. Please review the assets and terms, then click I Acknowledge on the form to complete the loan.

  • Agreement: {{ doc.name }}
  • Assets: {{ doc.assets|length }}
    • {% if doc.accessories %}
  • Accessories: {{ doc.accessories }}
    • {% endif %}

{{ frappe.utils.get_link_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name, 'Review & acknowledge') }}

Your acknowledgment is logged with your user account and timestamp as an audit trail. If anything looks wrong, reply to this email and HR will adjust.
name: Equipment Loan Agreement Employee Ack
subject: Action required: acknowledge your Equipment Loan Agreement ({{ doc.name }})
